title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider LLM configurations for the Dark Factory, testing whether Claude Opus should handle planning or implementation against Kimi K2.6. Using the Archon tool, he runs a matrix of four workflow variants across three real GitHub issues, scoring results on seven dimensions including correctness and code quality.
